seoTitle: Mount Arthur vs Mount Burrell — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Mount Arthur and Mount Burrell. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Mount Arthur vs Mount Burrell: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Mount Arthur and Mount Burrell.
heading: Mount Arthur vs Mount Burrell — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Mount Arthur, New South Wales and Mount Burrell, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Mount Arthur has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Mount Burrell (32/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Mount Arthur or Mount Burrell safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Mount Arthur has a flood risk score of 39/100, while Mount Burrell scores 41/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Mount Arthur scores 22/100 for bushfire risk. Mount Burrell scores 20/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Mount Arthur or Mount Burrell?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Mount Arthur has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.25% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
